docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-06-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTION SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR PLAINTIFF'S ATTY FAILURE TO APPEAR & FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF COURT. OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL SANCTIONS $150.00.
